info.name: InterParts Falcon5 WebService
info.description:
InterParts Falcon5 WebService v1.20 via parts-centraal-backend proxy.

Auth:
- Backend: x-api-key + x-api-secret headers
- InterParts: MD5 password login (doLogin). Server caches sessionId in Redis; you can omit sessionId in request bodies.

Set interpartsPasswordMd5 to the MD5 hex hash of your password, or configure INTERPARTS_USER_PASSWORD_MD5 in .env.

request.description: Get Falcon5 system version. No session required.
Login — saves sessionId to collection variable.
Customer profile, warehouses, credit limit, etc.
Product info, stock and prices (max 50 products).
Get download URL for product file.
Buy Now via goods issue note.
Sales documents for product in complaint date range.
